summary: PR-08 (Presentation Recovery arc, code lane) makes the Skills panel viewport-relative. skill_tree_panel.gd was a fixed 540x420 with a cramped 500x180 graph; now _apply_layout sizes the panel to panel_size_for(viewport) (a VIEWPORT_FRACTION clamped to MIN_PANEL/MAX_PANEL, never past the viewport minus VIEWPORT_MARGIN) and re-centres it on every get_viewport().size_changed, and the graph ScrollContainer + inspector EXPAND_FILL so the star-map takes the room and stays usable as lanes grow. Stretch is canvas_items+expand (logical viewport ~1280x720), so a same-aspect 640x360 window renders the layout scaled to fit; both target sizes verified to fit with a margin. No perk data, node layout (NODE_SIZE/SPACING), purchase path, persistence, or inspector format changed. Waited-GUI smoke 345/345; validator + capsule_doctor public_repo + wiki links green; HUD-QA 10_skill_panel (1280x720) + 11_skill_panel_small (640x360) reviewed. This completes the arc's code lane (PR-00..PR-08).
scope: PR-08 code lane only: skill_tree_panel.gd viewport-relative sizing (_apply_layout/panel_size_for/panel_size, VIEWPORT_FRACTION/MIN_PANEL/MAX_PANEL, scroll+inspector EXPAND_FILL); pr08 smoke; hud_visual_qa captures; validator hook; HANDOFF/matrix/queue/VARIABLE_MATRIX(.md+two-row .html sync) docs. No perks/lanes/mechanics/art/PNGs; no gameplay/save change. Broad wiki regen excluded.
next_action: Code lane complete (PR-00..PR-08); PR-09 deferred, PR-10 art lane. Next is an operator-chosen arc/queue item.
